"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Crawler.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Crawler.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Crawler.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Crawler.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o Crawler.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libCrawler.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Crawler.dir\linkLibs.rsp
